title: Oatmeal's Essentials
description: A mix of vanilla, fantasy, and rpg elements combined for a perfect vanilla+ experience
body:
# A great vanilla+ experience for you and your friends to enjoy!
Wizards, mages, archers, oh my!
Experience gameplay that both looks nice and behaves well.

**RPG Elements**
- Choose an Origin and a Class!
- Discover your path with the RPG series mods
- World map with waypoints and waystones
- Use your skilltree to upgrade yourself
- Better combat upgrades the way you fight off enemies

**Performance**
- Experience a boost in performance thanks to Sodium + Starlight and a group of other performance mods

**Visuals**
- A plethora of cosmetic mods adds falling leaves, 3d weather particles, enhanced explotions + thunderstorms and more
- Immerse yourself by using the included Complementary Reimagined + Euphoria mod

**Gameplay**
- Better End/Nether mods for a Nether and End that doesn't feel so boring
- Use grindstones to strip enchantments or sharpen your blade
- Trees that fall, nether portals that spread
- A gaggle of new animals and wildlife
- New frog villagers in swamp biomes

This pack is required both serverside and clientside
